title: Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani

heroImage.alt: Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani, Karnataka

overview.short: The Ramalingeshwara group of temples (also spelt Ramalingeshvara or Ramalingesvara and sometimes referred to as Rameshvara group), situated in Avani town of the Kolar district, Kar
overview.description: The Ramalingeshwara group of temples (also spelt Ramalingeshvara or Ramalingesvara and sometimes referred to as Rameshvara group), situated in Avani town of the Kolar district, Karnataka state, India, is constructed in the dravida style. According to the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI), the temple is an ornate 10th-century Nolamba dynasty construction which was partially renovated later by the Chola dynasty.The Vijayanagara kings built the main Mandapam and Rajagopuram. The temple is protected by the Archaeological Survey of India as a monument of national importance.

topPlaces.name: Avani, Kolar
topPlaces.description: Avani is a small village in Mulabaagilu taluk, Kolara district in Karnataka, India, about ten miles from Kolar Gold Fields. The village is located at 32 km from Kolara, the district centre and 13 km from Mulabaagilu, the Taluk headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Agrahara Somarasanahalli
topPlaces.description: Agrahara Somarasanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Padakasti
topPlaces.description: Padakasti is a small revenue village in Mulbagal taluk, Kolar district, Karnataka. It covers an area of 1.29 km2 (0.50 sq mi) and had a population of 544 as of the 2011 Indian Census.

topPlaces.name: Hulkuru
topPlaces.description: Hulkuru or Guttahalli is a small village in the Kolar Gold Fields Taluk of Kolar district in Karnataka, India. It is situated about 15 kilometers from Kolar Gold Fields.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (68 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani?
faq.a: Stays in Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramalingeshwara group of temples, Avani?
faq.a: The top attractions are Avani, Kolar, Agrahara Somarasanahalli, Padakasti, Hulkuru.
